Today 8:40am
Scaffold Logs
(3)
Bash

for d in /opt/*/; do count=0; total=0 for f in "$d"*; do if [ -f "$f" ] && [ ! -L "$f" ]; then count=$((count+1)) sz=$(stat -c %s "$f") total=$((total+sz)) fi done printf '%s\t%d\t%d\n' "$(basename "$d")" "$count" "$total" done
